'''bokaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vectoral|vectoral]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-k-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vectoral|vectoral]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bokaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bokarithi|bokarithi]] || [[word:bokariji|bokariji]] || [[word:bokarishi|bokarishi]] || [[word:bokariki|bokariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bokaruthuthu|bokaruthuthu]] || [[word:bokarujuju|bokarujuju]] || [[word:bokarushushu|bokarushushu]] || [[word:bokarukuku|bokarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bokaruthu|bokaruthu]] || [[word:bokaruju|bokaruju]] || [[word:bokarushu|bokarushu]] || [[word:bokaruku|bokaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bokarufthuf|bokarufthuf]] || [[word:bokarufjuf|bokarufjuf]] || [[word:bokarufshuf|bokarufshuf]] || [[word:bokarufkuf|bokarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bokarethe|bokarethe]] || [[word:bokareje|bokareje]] || [[word:bokareshe|bokareshe]] || [[word:bokareke|bokareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bokarothotho|bokarothotho]] || [[word:bokarojojo|bokarojojo]] || [[word:bokaroshosho|bokaroshosho]] || [[word:bokarokoko|bokarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bokarotho|bokarotho]] || [[word:bokarojo|bokarojo]] || [[word:bokarosho|bokarosho]] || [[word:bokaroko|bokaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bokarofthof|bokarofthof]] || [[word:bokarofjof|bokarofjof]] || [[word:bokarofshof|bokarofshof]] || [[word:bokarofkof|bokarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bokarÃŸfthÃŸf|bokarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bokarÃŸfjÃŸf|bokarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bokarÃŸfshÃŸf|bokarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bokarÃŸfkÃŸf|bokarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bokarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|bokarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bokarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|bokarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bokarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|bokarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bokarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|bokarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bokarÃŸfthÃŸf|bokarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bokarÃŸfjÃŸf|bokarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bokarÃŸfshÃŸf|bokarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bokarÃŸfkÃŸf|bokarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bokarÃŸfthÃŸf|bokarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bokarÃŸfjÃŸf|bokarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bokarÃŸfshÃŸf|bokarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bokarÃŸfkÃŸf|bokarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bokarÃḊthÃḊ|bokarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:bokarÃḊjÃḊ|bokarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:bokarÃḊshÃḊ|bokarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:bokarÃḊkÃḊ|bokarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bokarathatha|bokarathatha]] || [[word:bokarajaja|bokarajaja]] || [[word:bokarashasha|bokarashasha]] || [[word:bokarakaka|bokarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bokaratha|bokaratha]] || [[word:bokaraja|bokaraja]] || [[word:bokarasha|bokarasha]] || [[word:bokaraka|bokaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bokarafthaf|bokarafthaf]] || [[word:bokarafjaf|bokarafjaf]] || [[word:bokarafshaf|bokarafshaf]] || [[word:bokarafkaf|bokarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bokarasha|bokarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bokarshÃḋsha|bokarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bokarosha|bokarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bokarmusha|bokarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bokaryasha|bokaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobokarnkshÃḋsha|gobokarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobokarnkrosha|gobokarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobokarnkmusha|gobokarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobokarnkyasha|gobokarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bokakarasha|bokakarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bokakarshÃḋsha|bokakarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bokakarosha|bokakarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bokakarmusha|bokakarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bokakaryasha|bokakaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobokakarnkshÃḋsha|gobokakarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobokakarnkrosha|gobokakarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobokakarnkmusha|gobokakarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobokakarnkyasha|gobokakarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bekÃḊrasha|bekÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bekÃḊrshÃḋsha|bekÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bekÃḊrosha|bekÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bekÃḊrmusha|bekÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bekÃḊryasha|bekÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobekÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|gobekÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobekÃḊrnkrosha|gobekÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobekÃḊrnkmusha|gobekÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobekÃḊrnkyasha|gobekÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bokfarasha|bokfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bokfarshÃḋsha|bokfarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bokfarosha|bokfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bokfarmusha|bokfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bokfaryasha|bokfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobokfarnkshÃḋsha|gobokfarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobokfarnkrosha|gobokfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobokfarnkmusha|gobokfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobokfarnkyasha|gobokfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
